title: Haenyeo Culture Walk
description: Walk the coast where Jeju's women divers still work, then visit a community museum that puts the tradition in context.
local_story: Haenyeo culture is a UNESCO-recognized living tradition of free-diving women divers who built a distinct, matrifocal community structure in Jeju's coastal villages.
source_note: This is MVP experience-card data connected to JEJU-KB. It is not a real commercial product listing.
